subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1915 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: One day, whilst at Kazimayn, through which He passed on his first journey to Karbila and Baghdad, Jamal-i-Mubarak was appealed to by a young man, 'Abdu'l-Vahhab
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @stories; anecdotes, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
